vendor_performance_items.recommended_action: Escalate to executive vendor review and require formal corrective action plan.
Place vendor on leadership watch and review recurrence at next governance huddle.
Monitor open event and verify closure documentation.
Continue routine monitoring and maintain current vendor status.

Use vendor_score and performance_band to support vendor scorecards and business reviews.
Trend unresolved vendor events and CAPA-linked vendor events in Power BI.
